hooks.command: file=$(echo '$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT' | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$file" == *.ts || "$file" == *.tsx || "$file" == *.js ]]; then cd "/Users/janghoyong/BLOG AUTO" && npx prettier --write "$file" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
osascript -e 'display notification "작업 완료 — 확인해주세요" with title "Claude Code"' 2>/dev/null || true
